the blueberries collected by emily were 24. david collected 15 more than emily, so 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. david also collected three times as many as sophia, so sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. the total blueberries collected by emily and david is 24 + 39 = 63. they used the blueberries to make muffins. one batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so 63 / 9 = 7 batches. each batch was sold for $5, so 7 * 5 = 35 dollars. the money they made from the blueberries they collected is 35. the network of people who collected the blueberries was important. the travel to collect the blueberries was necessary. the money they made from the blueberries they collected is 35. youth
